name: Public Joint Stock Company ROSSETI South
summary: Public Joint Stock Company "ROSSETI South" transmits and distributes electricity in Russia. It also engages in the technical testing, research and certification, analysis of the mechanical and electrical characteristics of the finished product, design and construction works, professional, scientific, technical, and other activities; production, processing, and sale of agricultural products; telephone service and commercial activities, as well as the provision of management consulting, excursions, cultural, and entertainment services. The company also operates sanatorium recreation facility associated with the treatment and rehabilitation of adults, parents with children, and organized groups of school age children. It serves electricity retailers, entities of the wholesale and retail electricity markets, and local grid organizations. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Rostov-on-Don, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company "ROSSETI South" operates as a subsidiary of Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company.
